steps.title: Find the line from the table
steps.content: Since the function is linear, two table points are enough. Using $(1,54)$ and $(2,51)$, the slope is $$m=\frac{51-54}{2-1}=-3.$$ Substitute $(1,54)$ into $g(x)=mx+b$: $$54=-3(1)+b,$$ so $b=57$.

steps.title: Answer b
steps.content: In $g(x)=mx+b$, the value of $b$ is the $y$-intercept. Here $b=57$, which matches choice D.
